_meta.description: Defines what can go wrong and how to handle it

not_found_in_document.description: Requested information does not exist in document
not_found_in_document.response: I could not find [X] in this document.

document_not_loaded.response: No document is currently loaded. Please upload or select a document.

section_not_found.response: Section [X] was not found in this document.

incomplete_extraction.description: Partial data found, some fields missing
incomplete_extraction.response: I found partial information: [found]. Could not locate: [missing].

multiple_matches.response: I found multiple matches for [X]. Please clarify which one you mean.

unclear_intent.response: I'm not sure what you're asking. Could you rephrase or provide more context?

ambiguous_reference.response: When you say '[X]', are you referring to [option1] or [option2]?

conflicting_information.response: I found conflicting information: [A] in Section X vs [B] in Section Y.

precision_mismatch.description: User may expect more precision than available
precision_mismatch.response: Note: This value is approximate/rounded as stated in the source.

temporal_confusion.response: This information is from [date/version]. Please verify it's still current.

scope_limitation.description: Answer is partial due to scope
scope_limitation.response: This answer covers [scope]. For [out_of_scope], additional documents may be needed.

processing_timeout.response: The operation timed out. Please try a more specific query.

document_parsing_error.response: I had trouble reading this document. Some content may be inaccessible.

rate_limit.response: Please wait a moment before your next request.

stop_ask_behaviors.description: Conditions that require stopping and asking user
